title: Scaffold jmap-chat-egui crate
description:
## Why
Need a compilable crate skeleton before any feature work can begin.

## What
- Create crates/jmap-chat-egui/Cargo.toml with deps: jmap-chat, eframe, tokio, futures, chrono, ulid, clap
- Create src/main.rs (binary entry point), src/lib.rs (module re-exports)
- Create empty module stubs: src/config.rs, src/app.rs, src/client_task.rs, src/event.rs
- Add crate to workspace Cargo.toml
- cargo check passes with no warnings
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
